title: Pan-Seared Tuna with Kenyan Spices
description: A flavorful and healthy dish combining the freshness of tuna with the warm aromas of Kenyan spices.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: African-style spice mix with cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Season the tuna steaks with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the tuna for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a minute.
Mix Kenyan spice blend, lemon juice, and floral honey in a small bowl.
Brush the spice mixture evenly onto the seared tuna steaks.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
If desired, drizzle with silky soy sauce for added umami flavor.
